calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant James Richard, a/k/a James Arthur Richards, a/k/a James Richmond, individually and dba Southeast Electrical Contractors.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kelly Hill, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mid-Century Insurance Company, a California Corporation and Member of the Farmers Insurance Group of Companies.
Rajshree Shanbhag, Underwriting Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Hill and Ms. Shanbhag appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
James Richard, a/k/a James Arthur Richards, a/k/a James Richmond, individually and dba Southeast Electrical Contractors.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on November 20, 2018.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on ES Richards, defendant's Agent for Service, occurred on December 13, 2018, and was effectuated on December 24, 2018.
Default as to defendant James Richard, a/k/a James Arthur Richards, a/k/a James Richmond, individually and dba Southeast Electrical Contractors, was entered on June 25, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 25, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mid-Century Insurance Company, a California Corporation and Member of the Farmers Insurance Group of Companies, and against the defaulted defendant James Richard, a/k/a James Arthur Richards, a/k/a James Richmond, individually and dba Southeast Electrical Contractors, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $75,519.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $21,596.84.
Costs - $558.95.

Total - $94,675.01.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
